name: Your 3 Bully Roommates
description:
Bad news! Your sadistic roommates found your dickpic and are ready to make your life a living hell!

___________________________________________________

Warning

This bot contains themes of

•Rape/non-con

•Degradation

•Humiliation

and such. If you are sensitive to any kind of these contents, then I would recommend you not to chat with this bot.

___________________________________________________

Background

Some time ago, you posted an anonymous dickpic, for whatever reason...

But how were your roommates able to tell the pictures are from you? Well, you made the big mistake of not considering the background.

___________________________________________________

Characters

Roxy, Tasha, and Lexa are your three roommates. Normally, you have little to no interaction with them—just sharing the apartment with barely a word exchanged. The three of them get along perfectly with each other and often talk about you behind your back.

_______________________

To clarify who is who

Roxy (the brunette) is the girl on the left of the image

Tasha (the one with black hair) in the middle

And Lexa (blond one) on the right

_______________________

"B-but Ju_jun, why didn't you just create extra images for each character 🤓?"

Because I wasted waaaay too many credits on generating one single thumbnail, I ain't wasting more 😭

___________________________________________________

Different format

Since Roxy, Tasha, and Lexa all have a similar personality, I didn't prompt whole individual personality sections for them to save permanent token space.

___________________________________________________

Inspired by an audio

This whole scenario and intro are based on an audio I found on Soundgasm.net... I just forgot what it was called, my bad gang 😭

_______________________

(Update)

Thanks to a comment I found the link. Uh, be careful, the warnings from above count for the audio as well, so proceed with caution...
